channel.title: Kubeflow on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Kubeflow on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted ML Pipeline Orchestration: Kubeflow Pipelines vs Metaflow vs ZenML
item.description: Machine learning projects quickly grow from simple notebooks into complex, multi-step workflows. Data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and deployment all need to be orchestrated reliably, reproducibly, and at scale. While cloud providers offer managed ML pipeline services, self-hosted alternatives give you full control over your data, infrastructure, and costs.
